mapper.select: select b.orderid, b.jobid, b.version, b.stepid, b.seq1, b.seq2, b.seq3, b.column_name, b.update_val, b.status, c.pk_yn from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptable a, cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptableupdate b, cotdl.tbl_piitable c where 1=1 and a.ORDERID = b.ORDERID and a.jobid = b.JOBID and a.VERSION = b.VERSION and a.STEPID = b.STEPID and a.SEQ1 = b.SEQ1 and a.SEQ2 = b.SEQ2 and a.SEQ3 = b.SEQ3 and a.db = c.db and a.OWNER = c.owner and a.TABLE_NAME = c.TABLE_NAME and b.column_name = c.column_name and b.orderid= #{orderid} and b.stepid= #{stepid} and b.seq1= #{seq1} and b.seq2= #{seq2} and b.seq3= #{seq3}
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiordersteptableupdate (orderid, jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, column_name, update_val, status) values (#{orderid}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_val, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptableupdate where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piiordersteptableupdate where orderid= #{orderid} and jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
